perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male host in a striped shirt introducing the 'Jishu' calligraphy class. (2) A transition shows the interior of a workshop filled with craft materials and various calligraphy cards featuring stylized characters and drawings. (3) A group of people is shown looking through a portfolio of these artworks, pointing and laughing at specific designs. (4) A male with tattoos is seen practicing calligraphy at a wooden table. (5) A woman in a grey shirt accidentally drinks from a paper cup that contains brush-washing water, leading to a shocked reaction and group laughter. (6) A young male instructor demonstrates writing techniques while standing over the students. (7) The video concludes with a humorous focus on a participant's age.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, fast-paced acoustic background music and an energetic male voice explaining Jishu calligraphy. (2) There is a transition to ambient workshop sounds mixed with lively group conversation, frequent laughter, and high-pitched female exclamations. (3) Sound effects (SFX) such as variety-show style 'boing' and comedic chimes are used to punctuate funny moments, especially when the woman drinks the ink water. (4) The audio ends with clear, laughing vocals and a final musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Title Hook: '己書課' (Jishu Class) in a yellow box. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout, explaining that Jishu is a Japanese style of calligraphy that emphasizes personal style over right or wrong. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '那是洗筆水...' (That's brush-washing water...) and '是多渴???' (How thirsty are you???) appearing in large fonts to emphasize the comedic blunder. (4) Closing Text: '今年32歲^^' indicating a participant's age.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Concept Explanation -> Group Interaction -> Comedic Incident -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host in striped shirt, 1 female in blue overalls, 1 female in grey shirt, 1 male with tattoos, 1 young male instructor.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main characters include a host in a horizontal striped shirt and a woman in a grey long-sleeved shirt who becomes the center of a comedic mishap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor workspace filled with shelves of craft supplies, hanging decorations, and wooden tables used for calligraphy.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Comedic Climax -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a fun and lighthearted experience at a 'Jishu' calligraphy class, using a relatable and funny mistake (drinking brush water) to engage the audience and humanize the content creators.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a specific calligraphy method ('Jishu') and a workshop setting, likely promoting the class experience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: YGA crew humor and quick-cut editing style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on group chemistry and visual text cues to enhance the comedic effect of a simple mistake.
